report.summary: Community growth cycle v36 (Mar 16): Calendar extended to Jun 1 with 3 content pillars — Jupiter Solana DEX deep-dive (Metis routing, DCA, perps, LFG launchpad), Ondo Finance RWA institutional guide (USDY ~5% APY, OUSG, $800M+ TVL, BlackRock BUIDL), and fair token launch tease (lockdrops, LBPs, airdrop-first). Weekly newsletter drafted for Thu May 29 + Solana DeFi poll (Fri May 30). Two social cards created: social-jupiter-solana-dex.svg (green/purple Solana theme, 3 feature cards, 4 stat panels) and social-ondo-finance-rwa.svg (gold/blue TradFi theme, 3 product cards, yield convergence flow).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Mon May 26 — Twitter thread (5 posts): Jupiter Solana DEX — Metis routing engine, DCA + value averaging, 100x perps, LFG Launchpad, JUP governance; CTA to /learn/jupiter-solana-guide

Tue May 27 — Twitter thread (5 posts): Ondo Finance RWA — USDY ~5% APY tokenized treasuries, OUSG institutional bonds, $800M+ TVL, BlackRock BUIDL integration, multi-chain deployment, $10T+ TAM; CTA to /learn/ondo-finance-rwa-guide + /learn/staked-crypto-etfs-guide-2026
Wed May 28 — Twitter standalone: Fair Token Launches — lockdrops, lotteries, LBPs, airdrop-first distribution; tease for /learn/fair-token-launches-guide-2026

Thu May 29 — Full weekly newsletter: Jupiter lead story, Ondo RWA deep-dive, last week's poll results, fair launch preview, Tool of the Week (/tools/portfolio-tracker), tease peaq DePIN + fair launches for next week
Fri May 30 — Twitter poll: 'Best Solana DeFi protocol in 2026?' (Jupiter / Marinade / Pyth / Raydium)
Sat May 31 — Weekend wrap tweet: Jupiter + Ondo + fair launch tease recap; teases fair-token-launches + peaq DePIN for next week

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-jupiter-solana-dex.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark purple/green Solana theme; 'SOLANA DEFI · 2026' badge; 'Jupiter — Solana's Everything DEX' headline; 3 feature cards (Metis Routing #1 by Volume green border, DCA + Perps Full Suite teal border, LFG Launchpad JUP Governance purple border); 4 stat panels (Solana L1 400ms, Ultra-Low Fees <$0.01, JUP Airdrop Largest on Solana, All-In-One); CTA bar linking /learn/jupiter-solana-guide. Saved to /public/social-jupiter-solana-dex.svg

social-ondo-finance-rwa.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark blue/gold TradFi theme; 'REAL WORLD ASSETS · 2026' badge; 'Ondo Finance — Institutional RWAs Meet DeFi Yield' headline; 3 product cards (USDY ~5% APY gold border, OUSG Qualified Only blue border, Growth $800M+ TVL teal border); yield convergence flow (T-Bills → USDY/OUSG → DeFi Lending → Staked ETFs → Unified Yield); CTA bar linking /learn/ondo-finance-rwa-guide. Saved to /public/social-ondo-finance-rwa.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Calendar coverage: v36 fills May 26 – Jun 1. Combined with v17–v35, full social calendar now spans Mar 16 – Jun 1 (11+ weeks of content queued).
Jupiter and Ondo Finance guides were published today (Day 49b). Both are high-volume search targets — Jupiter is the #1 Solana DEX, Ondo is the #1 RWA protocol by mindshare.
The Jupiter guide creates natural cross-links to /tools/dca-calculator (our #1 tool) and Solana ecosystem pages, strengthening topical authority.
Ondo guide completes the RWA content cluster: staked ETFs + SEC-CFTC MOU + Ondo = comprehensive coverage that few competitors match.
Fair token launches tease (Wed) seeds interest for the upcoming publish — lockdrops and LBPs are trending search queries in the launchpad space.
Solana DeFi poll (Fri) drives engagement and provides data for future content prioritization.
480 pages now published (478 + Jupiter + Ondo today). 2 remaining in queue (fair-token-launches + peaq-depin-robotics). Queue nearly exhausted — new page scaffolding cycle needed.
No outstanding community feedback, bug reports, or DMs requiring response this cycle.
Ondo Finance social card saved to /public/social-ondo-finance-rwa.svg
